reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with stronger airport-specific governance framing, layered sensor logic, and lower marketing noise.
strengths: The article treats airport drone detection as an airside safety and coordination problem rather than generic perimeter surveillance.
It uses FAA guidance appropriately to frame both technology constraints and escalation workflow.
The revised ending keeps the article practical by turning the discussion into an airport design check instead of a brand section.
summary_assessment: This version passes under the stricter rubric. It is technically grounded, airport-specific, and more useful for planning than the earlier, more promotional variant.
